summary: Iteration 76 testing completed successfully. All features verified: 1) Action Items widget completely REMOVED from Home Dashboard, 2) Task Metrics widget present with 4 tiles (Assigned to Me, Created by Me, Overdue, High Severity), 3) No 'New Task' button on home page, 4) Travel/Budget requests with submit_for_approval=true create approval tasks in tasks_v2 collection, 5) RBAC module includes Task Management category with task_management, task_milestones, task_labels modules, 6) Google OAuth callbacks store session_token in localStorage and use window.location.href for navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: HomeDashboard.js correctly imports only TaskMetricsWidget, not ActionItemsWidget
ActionItemsWidget.js file still exists but is not imported - can be deleted for cleanup
create_approval_task() in server.py correctly inserts into both 'tasks' and 'tasks_v2' collections
complete_approval_task() in server.py correctly updates both collections when approval is processed
Travel requests create approval tasks for CEO and Director roles
Budget requests create approval tasks for Director role only
GoogleAuthCallback.js and AuthCallback.js both store session_token in localStorage for iPad/Safari compatibility
Both OAuth callbacks use window.location.href = '/home' for full page reload to reinitialize AuthProvider
MODULE_LABELS in role.py includes correct labels: Tasks, Milestones, Labels
TenantSettings.js MODULE_CONFIG includes task_management, task_milestones, task_labels in collaboration section
seed_data_creation: Test travel and budget requests created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home Dashboard now shows only TaskMetricsWidget (4 tiles) without ActionItemsWidget. Travel/Budget requests with submit_for_approval=true automatically create approval tasks in tasks_v2 collection. Tasks page at /tasks shows all tasks including auto-created approval tasks. RBAC module settings include Task Management category. Google OAuth login stores session_token in localStorage for iPad compatibility.

Home_Dashboard_Action_Items_Removed.verification: ActionItemsWidget not imported in HomeDashboard.js, no task list visible on home page

Home_Dashboard_No_New_Task_Button.verification: No 'New Task' button found on home dashboard

Draft_Requests_No_Task_Creation.verification: Travel/Budget requests with submit_for_approval=false do NOT create approval tasks
